build_system: pnpm + turbo, ESM modules (type: module), moduleResolution: bundler
test_framework: vitest with globals:true, test files in src/__tests__/*.test.ts
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Node 22. No real API calls in tests - must mock all providers.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. All gates pass. New branch from current HEAD. Commit: feat(quant-live): add LLM streaming with tool registry and sentence splitter
key_patterns: AsyncIterable pattern for streaming (see TTSProvider, PrefetchBuffer). Factory pattern for providers (see TTSProviderFactory). .js extensions on imports. Types in types.ts, re-exported from index.ts. Pipeline in src/core/pipeline.ts. Tests mock providers fully.
